Class BakeryApi

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.BakeryApi
public final class BakeryApi extends Object
Admin bakery create update and delete. Uses paths under /api/v1/bakeries.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Bakery
    create(Bakery bakery)
    Creates one bakery and returns the stored bakery row.
    static void
    delete(int id)
    Deletes one bakery row by id.
    static List<Bakery>
    listAll()
    Returns all bakeries mapped into desktop Bakery models.
    static Bakery
    toBakery(CatalogApi.BakeryResponse b)
    Maps a catalog bakery payload into the desktop Bakery model.
    static void
    update(int id, Bakery bakery)
    Updates one bakery row by id.
